title: [codereview-pass1 post-string] string length limit too small for DTN messages
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/senml/senml.c:178 and senml.h:57 - Uses SENML_MAX_NAME_LEN=32 for vs strings but deaddrop messages per spec can be longer (e.g. 100+ chars). Add SENML_MAX_STRING_LEN=256. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-pp9k
